clubLeads.description: Label for the list of Club leads.

prereviews.description: Heading for the section showing the Club’s PREreviews.

noResults.description: Text shown when the Club has not published any PREreviews.

appearHere.message: When they do, it’ll appear here.
appearHere.description: Text that follows the message “{name} hasn’t published a PREreview yet.” when the Club has not published any PREreviews.
